display.purpose: Hero headline only, with the typed green rotating word.

body.purpose: All prose, Soft Ink on Paper.

label.purpose: Documentary apparatus: eyebrows, figure captions, footer heads. Uppercase, +0.14em.

shadows.name: whatsapp-float
shadows.purpose: The only shadow in the system; keeps the WhatsApp float touchable above content.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Standard scroll reveal for single elements.

motion.name: group-stagger
motion.purpose: Card/work/review grids reveal as a staggered set.

motion.name: figure-zoom
motion.purpose: Photo settles into its figure frame on reveal.

motion.name: numeral-drift
motion.purpose: Outline section numerals parallax on scroll.

motion.name: marquee
motion.purpose: Partner logo strip; paused on hover, off under reduced motion.

motion.name: lenis
motion.purpose: Global scroll smoothing; anchors glide via lenis.scrollTo offset -72.

components.name: Primary Button (green)
components.description: The conversion action — devis, réalisations CTA.

components.name: Ink Button (phone CTA)
components.description: The nav phone CTA — solid ink, always visible.

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action beside a filled button.

components.name: Figure Frame
components.description: Signature photo treatment — bordered frame with mono caption bar.

components.name: Service Item (open)
components.description: Prestations list item — hairline top-rule, no box.
components.html:
S.02

Mise aux normes

Mise en conformité de vos installations électriques dans les Alpes-Maritimes.

narrative.overview: The site is composed like the technical dossier a meticulous electrician would hand you with his devis: photographs framed as numbered figures with monospace captions, schematic section labels, a faint drafting grid under everything, one engineer's-marker green for what matters. The presentation itself is the proof of rigor — if the site is this precise, so is the wiring. Warmth comes from real chantier photography and the artisan's own story, never from decorative softness.
keyCharacteristics: Paper-white drafting surface with a faint 72px grid
One accent: the original brand green, used for action and emphasis only
Content sits openly on the paper, structured by hairline rules — almost no boxes
Two framed document figures only (hero, à propos); réalisations is an animated masonry
Grotesk display type over a workmanlike body sans, mono for labels

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: Green appears only where it means something: an action, an active state, a key term. If a screen is more than ~10% green, it has stopped being signal.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: All structure is drawn with 1px lines at 16% ink. No shadows-as-borders, no thick strokes, no side-stripes.

rules.name: The Apparatus Rule
rules.body: Mono uppercase is reserved for the documentary apparatus — numbering, captions, column labels. Never for persuasive copy or CTAs.

rules.name: The Flat Dossier Rule
rules.body: Surfaces sit on the paper, they do not hover over it. If a card casts a shadow, it's a bug.

rules.name: The Open Paper Rule
rules.body: Content is not boxed. Services, reviews and contact rows sit directly on the paper, separated by hairline top-rules. Full borders are reserved for the two framed figures, form fields and buttons.

dos: Do keep Soft Ink (#4A5258) as the floor for text on paper; never lighter.
Do frame every photo as a numbered figure with a mono caption — no naked images.
Do keep motion in the established grammar: GSAP power3.out reveals, Lenis smoothing, marquee partners — all gated behind prefers-reduced-motion.
Do keep every fold one action away from tel: or WhatsApp.
Do keep the page a single self-contained HTML file; no build step, no framework.
donts: Don't produce generic AI landing-page aesthetics: gradient text, glassmorphism, hero-metric templates, identical icon-card grids.
Don't add urgency furniture — countdowns, discount banners, popup chat.
Don't drift toward wellness-cream softness: no serif italics, no warm beige drench, no rounded-pill everything.
Don't introduce a second accent color or use green decoratively.
Don't add shadows to resting surfaces or side-stripe borders thicker than 1px.
Don't re-label photos with provenance badges (réel/illustration) — the owner removed them deliberately.
Don't box content into bordered cards — hairline top-rules only.
